summary: Maintainer-filed enhancement to add scroll wheel event support to SkiaSharp's Blazor WASM views (SKCanvasView and SKGLView) with values normalized to the v120 standard (120 = one discrete mouse wheel notch), as part of the cross-platform wheel standardization effort (#3533).

stepsToReproduce: Use SKCanvasView or SKGLView in a Blazor WASM application
Scroll the mouse wheel over the canvas
Observe that no wheel event is fired — the canvas has no wheel event handling
reproEvidence.environmentDetails: Blazor WASM (net6.0+ and net8.0+), all browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)

repoLinks.description: Parent issue: Standardize WheelDelta to v120 convention across all platforms
Closed PR: Add touch/pointer event support to Blazor views and revamp sample app (included wheel)
Open PR: Add revamped Blazor sample pages from PR #3528 (sample changes only)

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: The Blazor views currently have zero touch/wheel event infrastructure. This enhancement has never been implemented on main.

analysis.summary: Well-specified maintainer-filed enhancement to add wheel event support to Blazor WASM canvas views. The issue provides complete normalization logic (TypeScript), cross-browser delta tables, expected results, and implementation notes. A prior PR (#3528) was closed but contained an implementation. The issue states work was validated on a feature branch with 72/72 Playwright tests passing across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.
analysis.rationale: This is type/enhancement (adding wheel support to existing Blazor views that already handle rendering but lack input events) rather than type/feature-request (the touch event infrastructure exists in MAUI, this extends it to Blazor). Area is area/SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor since all changes are in the Blazor view components and their JS interop layer. The maintainer authored the issue with full implementation details, so this is actionable and well-scoped.

keySignals.text: Add scroll wheel support to SkiaSharp's Blazor WASM views (SKCanvasView and SKGLView)
keySignals.interpretation: Clear scope — two specific view components need wheel event handling.
Part of a coordinated cross-platform wheel standardization effort with sibling issues #3535-#3540.

keySignals.text: The v120 normalization has been implemented on branch copilot/add-touch-event-blazor-canvas (commit 052d325bc)
keySignals.interpretation: Implementation exists on a feature branch and has been validated with automated tests.

keySignals.text: Must handle both NET7+ ([JSImport]/[JSExport]) and pre-NET7 (DotNetObjectReference.invokeMethod) interop paths
keySignals.interpretation: Implementation must support two JS interop patterns for backwards compatibility.

codeInvestigation.finding: SKCanvasView currently handles only rendering (OnPaintSurface), DPI changes, and size changes. No touch, pointer, or wheel event infrastructure exists.
SKHtmlCanvas class handles canvas initialization (raster and GL) and render loop management only. No addEventListener calls for wheel, pointer, or touch events.
C# interop layer for canvas operations. No callback infrastructure for input events — only render frame callback exists.
SKTouchAction.WheelChanged enum and SKTouchEventArgs.WheelDelta property exist in MAUI. These types need to be shared with or duplicated for Blazor.

nextQuestions: Should the touch event types (SKTouchAction, SKTouchEventArgs, etc.) be moved to a shared assembly or duplicated for Blazor?
Will the closed PR #3528 be reworked or will a fresh PR be created from the feature branch?
Should horizontal wheel (deltaX) support be included in the same enhancement?

resolution.hypothesis: The Blazor WASM views need a JS wheel event listener on the canvas element that normalizes browser-specific delta values to the v120 standard and calls back into C# via JS interop.

proposals.title: Implement wheel events from feature branch
proposals.description: Merge or rework the implementation from branch copilot/add-touch-event-blazor-canvas. The feature branch has validated normalization logic covering pixel, line, and page deltaMode with tests across 3 browser engines.

proposals.title: Extract implementation from closed PR #3528
proposals.description: PR #3528 contained touch/pointer and wheel event support for Blazor views but was closed. The wheel-specific changes could be extracted into a focused PR.

resolution.recommendedProposal: Implement wheel events from feature branch
resolution.recommendedReason: The feature branch already has validated implementation with 72/72 Playwright tests passing across all major browser engines.

actionability.reason: Well-specified enhancement with implementation on a feature branch. Needs review of the branch changes and creation of a PR.

actions.description: Update area label to the more specific Blazor area and add WASM platform label
Cross-reference closed PR that contained Blazor touch/wheel implementation
